Comments:
Discussed case with technologist.  We consulted the protocol and found that this is correct.  Neither of us were aware that STN exams required that the images be reviewed before closing the exam.    Thank you for bringing this to our attention.   jwm

This case has multiple significant issues that can generate misdiagnosis:
1. Case not checked (all neck radiographs need to have reading room check).
2. Inadequate positioning, especially on lateral radiograph, limiting the evaluation of several important structures.
3. Case showed up on the list to be read 2 days later.    CVG
